{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":491854,"duration_api_ms":295383,"num_turns":48,"result":"Phase 3 완료. 커밋 `993a810c feat(contact-feedback-pack): phase 3 — timeline-realtime` 생성.

## AC 결과
- `pnpm build` → 성공
- `npx tsc --noEmit` → 성공 (에러 0건)
- `pnpm test -- --testPathPattern="worker/dashboard|realtime|admin/contacts/_lib"` → 해당 경로 기존 유닛 테스트 없음 (phase 6 E2E S3 에서 소켓 전파 검증 예정). 전체 테스트 708/716 pass — 2건 실패는 R2 env 관련 **기존 실패** (stash 후에도 동일), 이번 변경과 무관.

## 변경 요약
- `src/app/(admin)/admin/contacts/_lib/hooks.ts` — `contact:updated` / `status_changed` / `process_stage_changed` 핸들러에 `queryKeys.contacts.timeline(data.id)` invalidate 추가 (기존 `contacts.all` invalidate 유지). `drawing_revision_added` 핸들러는 기존에 이미 존재.
- `src/app/worker/dashboard/page.tsx` — `invalidateTimelineFromContactId` 헬퍼 + `contact:drawing_revision_added` 신규 핸들러 추가, 기존 `updated`/`status_changed`/`process_stage_changed` 핸들러를 inline 함수로 래핑해 timeline invalidate + `debouncedTargetedInvalidate` 동시 호출.
- `socketManager` namespace singleton 재사용 — 추가 연결 없음.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"81cdb6e9-dc04-4983-99df-10e20ed35478","total_cost_usd":3.519989250000001,"usage":{"input_tokens":57,"cache_creation_input_tokens":124479,"cache_read_input_tokens":4403421,"output_tokens":21600,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":124479,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":570,"cache_read_input_tokens":117394,"cache_creation_input_tokens":671,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":671},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":57,"outputTokens":21600,"cacheReadInputTokens":4403421,"cacheCreationInputTokens":124479,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":3.519989250000001,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"543f588e-cfc3-417e-a0bc-e52c64cb61ff"}
